description: Feature tracking for NexlifyCorp AI Financial Analyst

features.name: SEC Filing Extractor
features.description: Extract 10-K and 10-Q filings via edgartools with metadata, sections, and XBRL financials

features.name: SEC Filing Extractor Tests
features.description: 42 unit tests covering extraction functions, metadata, sections, financials, and model serialization

features.name: Chunking Strategy Design
features.description: Design document for two distinct chunking strategies: SEC (paragraph/sentence splitting) and Internal (H3 header-based)

features.name: SEC Paragraph Chunker
features.description:
Chunk SEC filings by paragraph (

) then sentence boundary. Target ~1000 chars. 138 tests passing.

features.name: Internal Doc H3 Chunker
features.description: Chunk internal docs by H3 headers with H2 parent context. Skip empty sections and H2 containers.

features.name: Internal Document Extractor
features.description: Extract Nexlify Corp internal documents using Markdown header parsing. Extracts sections, metadata, topics, and classification flags.

features.name: Ingestion Pipeline Orchestrator
features.description: Orchestrates Extract → Chunk → Store flow. Single entry point for ingesting SEC filings and internal docs into Qdrant via VectorStore.

features.name: Ontology Enrichment
features.description: LLM-powered semantic metadata injection (concepts, strategic_themes, departments) into chunks via structured output. Pluggable via enable_ontology flag.

features.name: Text Cleaner
features.description: Clean SEC filing text - remove box-drawing chars, page footers, normalize whitespace

features.name: Data Types
features.description: Pydantic models for SEC10K, SECMetadata, SECSection, SECFinancials, DataSource

features.name: Basic Hybrid RAG
features.description: Ingestion with metadata filtering and basic vector retrieval

features.name: Production RAG
features.description: Hybrid search, reranking, and evaluation with Ragas

features.name: Knowledge Graphs
features.description: Neo4j entity extraction, relationship mapping, multi-hop reasoning

features.name: GraphRAG
features.description: Graph-based retrieval augmented generation over financial data

features.name: Agentic RAG
features.description: Multi-step research agents with LangGraph workflows

features.name: Financial Analysis Agent
features.description: Agent specialized in financial document analysis and metrics extraction

features.name: Risk Intelligence QA Agent
features.description: LangGraph agent that answers natural language risk questions grounded in KB with cited sources. 4-node graph: route (Haiku) → retrieve → reason → generate. Dual-path retrieval (public SEC vs internal docs) with conflict detection.

features.name: Risk Assessment Agent
features.description: Agent for risk factor identification and assessment from SEC filings

features.name: Earnings Comparison Agent
features.description: Agent for comparing earnings across quarters and years

features.name: Enterprise Governance
features.description: Metadata governance, versioning, and RBAC simulation

features.name: Streamlit UI
features.description: Web UI for querying and interacting with the knowledge base

features.name: Databricks Lakehouse Integration
features.description: Unity Catalog + Mosaic AI Vector Search migration

statuses.planned: Feature is planned but not started
